project_type: Next.js 16 App Router SEO site with Prisma ORM
build_system: npm with Next.js build, tsx for scripts
test_framework: No test framework configured - lint only
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run lint to verify no errors. 2. Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify TypeScript compiles. 3. Do NOT run seed scripts (they require network access to AniList/Jikan and take too long).
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node.js 22 available. PostgreSQL database is remote (Neon). Do NOT run seed scripts during verification. The build may fail on generateStaticParams since there is no local DB - this is expected and acceptable.
contribution_requirements: Push to main branch directly. Commit meaningful changes.
key_patterns:
Content generator returns markdown strings. Pages use dangerouslySetInnerHTML with .replace(/\n/g, '
') to render. Seed script uses AniList GraphQL with rate limiting. Filler data is in src/lib/filler-data.ts with a hardcoded FILLER_DATABASE array. The fetchFillerDataFromGitHub function attempts to fetch from GitHub but the repo is actually a web scraper of animefillerlist.com (no static JSON file exists). Scripts live in scripts/ dir and run via tsx.
directory_structure: src/app/ - Next.js App Router pages. src/lib/ - shared library code. src/components/ - React components. scripts/ - CLI scripts (seed.ts). prisma/ - schema and migrations.
